title: Spot Elastigroup
description: An Elastigroup is a compute group that manages and optimizes cloud instances across spot, reserved, and on-demand capacity to ensure availability at the lowest cost.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Elastigroup.

region.description: The cloud provider region where the Elastigroup is deployed.

capacity.description: The capacity configuration for the Elastigroup.

strategy.description: The optimization strategy for the Elastigroup.

onDemandCount.description: Number of on-demand instances to maintain.

availabilityVsCost.description: The optimization preference between availability and cost.

fallbackToOd.description: Whether to fall back to on-demand instances when spot is unavailable.

utilizeReservedInstances.description: Whether to utilize reserved instances when available.

compute.description: The compute configuration for the Elastigroup.

spot.description: The spot instance types to consider.

availabilityZones.description: The availability zones for the Elastigroup.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the Elastigroup was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the Elastigroup was last updated.
